title: tragacantha gummifera
intro: Tragacantha gummifera, also known as the gum tragacanth plant, is a type of shrub that is native to the Middle East and Europe. It is a natural adhesive derived from the sap of the plant, which is rich in gum and mucilage. The medicinal properties of Tragacantha gummifera lie in its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural laxative. The health benefits of using Tragacantha gummifera include treating constipation, diarrhea, and irritable bowel syndrome, and it is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and powders for medicinal use.
